name: Design Approved
description: Updates the permit status when the design approval date is known, waits one minute, adds an approval note, and sends an internal email notification with design details.

fields.note_body: DA has been signed by the customer on {{ enrolled_object.layout_approval_date }}. The DA Turnaround Time was {{ enrolled_object.time_between_da_sent_and_da_approved }}.

fields.subject: Design Approved - {{ enrolled_object.dealname }}
fields.body:
DA has been signed by the customer on {{ enrolled_object.layout_approval_date }}. The DA Turnaround Time was {{ enrolled_object.time_between_da_sent_and_da_approved }}.
